mapper.sql: subject_id, tenant_id, title, subject_type, scope, scope_reference_id, status, publish_at, vote_start_at, vote_end_at, settled_at, party_ratio_floor, max_winners, version, create_time, proposed_by_user_id, cancelled_at, cancelled_by_user_id, cancel_reason
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_subject WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM t_voting_subject WHERE status = 3 AND vote_end_at IS NOT NULL AND vote_end_at < #{now} ORDER BY vote_end_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_voting_subject SET status = 6, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, cancelled_by_user_id = #{cancelledByUserId}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, version = version + 1 WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_subject WHERE status = 2 AND vote_start_at IS NOT NULL AND vote_start_at <= #{now} ORDER BY vote_start_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
